ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Bust, Waist, Sleeves) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* The measurement value (e.g., 29-30") */,
  "measurement_min" TEXT /* Minimum measurement value */,
  "measurement_max" TEXT /* Maximum measurement value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the apparel category (e.g., Women's, Jackets) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the apparel category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel category */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "product_line_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES apparel_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line associated with the return */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category of the returned item */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return related to sizing issues */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Customer name */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Customer email address */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Customer shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Designer, Customer Service) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided feedback */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line associated with the feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category of the item */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_comments" TEXT /* Customer comments related to sizing issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data related to sizing issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
